atomicity.message: The staged slice is exactly land-17: completion guided install/verify behavior, installer confirmation/PATH guidance, release-install docs, and completion/install tests. The land-19 main.go arrow-chain hunk is not staged; installer preview arrow strings remain deferred current behavior as packeted.

conditions.message: The staged completion/install payload is formatted, shell-parseable, and passes focused plus full Go test suites.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2433: git diff --cached --name-status/stat matched the packet exactly: cmd/burpvalve/help_test.go, cmd/burpvalve/install_script_test.go, cmd/burpvalve/main.go, docs/release-install.md, install.sh; 1387 insertions and 59 deletions.
ScarletMarsh verified staged Go blobs were gofmt-clean, git diff --cached --check exited 0, and bash -n install.sh exited 0.
ScarletMarsh verified go run ./cmd/burpvalve completion --help, go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Completion|Install|Help|Script', and go test ./... all exited 0.

conditions.message: The governed completion/install surface avoids material duplication and keeps install planning/confirmation/verify logic factored through shared helpers.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2432: staged path/stat inspection showed only the five land-17 packet paths with the packet's 5-file/1387-insertion staged slice.

BrightOwl inspected staged main.go and found completion install planning/confirmation/apply helpers and completion verify report construction factored into shared helper functions rather than duplicated command branches.
BrightOwl ran go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Completion|Install|Help|Script' in an isolated staged snapshot and it passed.

conditions.message: The payload does not make readiness easier by silently applying setup; it requires explicit user approval for mutating paths and reports actionable verify/install state.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2432: confirmCompletionInstall inspection showed noninteractive installs fail before writes unless --force is explicit, and interactive confirmation defaults No.
BrightOwl inspected install.sh and found the plan is printed before mkdir/rm/cp/mv/ln writes, --yes is explicit, and no-terminal without --yes exits before apply.

BrightOwl verified go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Completion|Install|Help|Script' passed, including tests named RequiresConfirmationBeforeUserWrites, CompletionInstallRequiresConfirmationWithoutForce, CompletionInstallCancelLeavesNoPartialWrites, and YesAppliesPreviewedPlan.
ScarletMarsh message 2433 independently agreed pass for this shared cell, citing mutating=false/action_needed completion verify output and no-write installer cancellation tests.

conditions.message: The new completion/install behaviors have focused tests for newly added functions and modes, including happy paths, fallback paths, override precedence, and cancellation.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2433: help_test.go staged tests cover configured-shell guide labels, completion verify JSON ready state, repo-local-only and missing-completion reports, PATH plus repo-local origin, --no-path mode, configured defaults in human output, flag override precedence, shell variants, ambiguous shell detection, install cancellation, install plan support, and wizard configured-shell prompt text.
ScarletMarsh verified install_script_test.go adds tests for confirmation-before-write, explicit --yes application, symlink/shim installation, PATH messaging, and replacement preview behavior.
ScarletMarsh verified go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Completion|Install|Help|Script' and go test ./... exited 0.

conditions.message: Implementation, docs, installer behavior, and targeted/full tests are present for the staged slice.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2432: git diff --cached --check exited 0 on the staged payload.
BrightOwl message 2432: bash -n install.sh passed in the isolated staged snapshot.
BrightOwl message 2432: go run ./cmd/burpvalve completion --help succeeded and documented completion install/verify subcommands.
BrightOwl message 2432: go test ./... passed in the isolated staged snapshot across cmd/burpvalve and internal packages.

conditions.message: The governed evidence surface is completion/install diagnostics and release-install guidance; missing setup is explicit through structured fields and exact next steps.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2433: completion verify JSON probe returned schema_version=1, command='completion verify', status='action_needed', mutating=false, shell='zsh', shell_source='flag', completion_exists=false, completion_looks_ok=false, command_origin='path', and a next_steps install command.
ScarletMarsh verified robot completion help reports structured JSON, documents precedence, and tells agents to use script_command only for raw shell scripts.
ScarletMarsh verified robot docs add completion verify output fields including status, mutating, shell_source, detection_evidence, command_origin, command_on_path, reload guidance, and next_steps.
ScarletMarsh verified docs/release-install.md and install.sh now describe explicit install targets, --yes semantics, install plan, verify command, and PATH status.

conditions.message: The staged payload stays within land-17 completion guided install and installer confirmation/PATH guidance; no staged land-19 main.go arrow-chain hunk was found.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2432: git diff --cached --name-status showed only the five packet paths and no unrelated Phase 2 files.

BrightOwl verified git diff --cached -- cmd/burpvalve/main.go | rg 'create command shim|->|installCommandShim' produced no output, while HEAD already contained create-command-shim text; the land-19 overlap string is not staged in main.go.
BrightOwl found staged changes concentrated in completion install/verify/help behavior, install.sh guided install behavior, release-install docs, and tests.
ScarletMarsh message 2433 independently agreed pass for this shared cell and confirmed only installer preview/test arrow strings remain, as packeted for land-17.

conditions.message: Destructive file operations are previewed and gated by explicit confirmation/--yes, with tests for no-write cancellation.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2432: install.sh inspection showed rm/cp/mv/ln operations occur only after confirm_install_plan returns; without --yes and without a TTY, the script exits before mkdir/rm/cp/mv/ln.
BrightOwl verified TestInstallScriptRequiresConfirmationBeforeUserWrites asserts skillsDir and binDir are not created when confirmation is unavailable.
BrightOwl inspected installCommandShim and found existing nonmatching files are rejected rather than overwritten; existing matching symlink is treated idempotently.

conditions.message: Verification state is derived from observed files/PATH/config without mutating them, and installer replacement behavior preserves preview-before-apply semantics.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2432: go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Completion|Install|Help|Script' passed, covering configured defaults, flag overrides, shell variants, command-origin states, no-path mode, and installer replacement preview/apply behavior.
BrightOwl ran a staged-snapshot completion verify probe that returned mutating:false and files_before=0/files_after=0 while reporting action_needed next_steps.

BrightOwl inspected buildCompletionVerifyReport and found it records status inputs separately: completion path/existence/shape, rc marker, bin dir, PATH membership, command origin, repo-local fallback, version, and next_steps.

conditions.message: No silent trust expansion was found in the governed install/completion surface; the feature reports command provenance and requires explicit write approval.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2432: completion verify executes only the resolved burpvalve command for --version and otherwise uses filesystem/path checks; next-step commands quote user paths with shellQuote.
BrightOwl inspected install.sh and found download paths constrained through explicit repo/version/archive inputs and writes target selected skills/bin dirs after preview.

BrightOwl verified go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Completion|Install|Help|Script' passed, including command-origin and no-path tests distinguishing PATH, repo-local fallback, and missing command states.

ScarletMarsh message 2433 independently agreed pass for this shared cell, citing confirmation gating, mutating=false verify output, limited external execution, no credential handling, and explicit --skills-dir/--bin-dir docs.

conditions.message: The staged payload contains no governed browser UI, image/canvas asset, demo recording, screenshot, or TUI layout surface.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2433: staged path list showed only Go CLI/test files, docs/release-install.md, and install.sh.
ScarletMarsh confirmed the staged diff does not touch docs/demos, README demo media, image assets, browser/frontend code, terminal snapshot assets, or Bubble Tea view/layout code.
The relevant user-facing output was checked textually through go run ./cmd/burpvalve completion --help and completion verify JSON output.

conditions.message: The staged payload has no governed performance-budget surface: it adds small shell/config/PATH checks and installer confirmation text, not hot paths, large scans, network loops, or long-running build/runtime logic.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2433: pre-analysis marked PERF=- for unit 17, and staged inspection found completion verify checks limited to config lookup, a few os.Stat/os.ReadFile checks, PATH list inspection, optional ps shell detection, and command --version probing.

ScarletMarsh verified install.sh staged changes add a confirmation plan and post-install PATH messaging around the existing install flow without new polling, recursive scanning, or repeated download/build loops.
Focused and full Go test suites completed successfully.

conditions.message: The tool can guide users and produce commands, but does not autonomously mutate shell startup, completion, skill, or shim paths without explicit approval.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2432: confirmCompletionInstall inspection showed default No and explicit --force requirement for noninteractive completion install writes.
BrightOwl inspected install.sh and found default No, --yes as the explicit noninteractive apply control, and cancellation/no-terminal paths before writes.
BrightOwl verified go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Completion|Install|Help|Script' passed, including cancellation/no-write and explicit-yes apply tests.
